matcha_leaves.name: Green Tea Leaves
matcha_leaves.desc: Fresh green leaves. Highly demanded by tea masters.

bamboo_shoots.name: Bamboo Shoots
bamboo_shoots.desc: Crisp and edible. A common forest ingredient.

lotus_root.name: Wild Root
lotus_root.desc: A crunchy root foraged from muddy ponds.

rice_ball.name: Rice Bowl
rice_ball.desc: Savory meal. Restores 30 HP and 15 Stamina.

tengu_feather.name: Wind Feather
tengu_feather.desc: A glossy dark feather carrying currents of wind.

oni_horn.name: Demon Horn
oni_horn.desc: A heavy, dark crimson horn vibrating with power.

training_sword.name: Wooden Sword
training_sword.desc: A heavy wooden training sword. Adds +3 Attack.

steel_katana.name: Righteousness Blade of Righteousness
steel_katana.desc: An old legendary, Abandoned by the heavens. Adds +8 Attack.

golden_elixir.name: Golden Elixir
golden_elixir.desc: An imperial elixir. Fully restores Health and Stamina.

bamboo_staff.name: Wooden Staff
bamboo_staff.desc: A simple, light wooden staff. Adds +2 Attack.

tachi.name: Refined Blade
tachi.desc: A battle-worn curved blade. Perfect Condition. Adds +6 Attack.

eye_of_artic.name: Eye of Artic
eye_of_artic.desc: Legendary artifact belonging to Alduin or the ancient dragons, this usually refers to the Eye of Magnus. Adds +5 Defense and +12 Attack.

rusted_tachi.name: Rusted Blade
rusted_tachi.desc: An old, battle-worn curved blade. Adds +4 Attack.

shinobi_kodachi.name: Agile Dagger
shinobi_kodachi.desc: A short, agile steel sword used by stealth agents. Adds +6 Attack.

oni_club.name: Iron Club
oni_club.desc: A brutal, iron-spiked club capable of crushing bone. Adds +10 Attack.

straw_hat.name: Straw Hat
straw_hat.desc: A simple woven straw hat. Adds +1 Defense.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.desc: A round wooden shield reinforced with iron rings. Adds +2 Defense.

samurai_armor.name: Iron Plate Armor
samurai_armor.desc: Traditional iron plate armor. Adds +5 Defense.

amulet.name: Lucky Amulet
amulet.desc: A protective temple amulet. Adds +1 Attack and +1 Defense.
